statements.text: Hippos kill more people than lions in Africa
Cheetahs cannot roar
Elephants hatch from eggs
Penguins can jump up to about 2 meters
Ostriches cannot fly
All birds have teeth
Dolphins can sleep with one eye open
Blue whales are the largest animals on Earth
Whales breathe through gills
Bats are mammals
Elephants cannot jump
All mammals lay eggs
Tigers have striped skin, not just striped fur
Lions live in social groups called prides
Cheetahs hunt mainly at night like lions
Giraffes have seven neck vertebrae like humans
Polar bears have black skin under their fur
Camels store water in their humps
Octopuses have three hearts
Squids have a beak-like mouthpart
Octopuses have internal skeletons
Koalas are marsupials
Kangaroo joeys develop in a pouch
Marsupials lay eggs
Male seahorses carry the young
Seahorses are fish
Seahorses are fast swimmers
Owls can rotate their heads about 270 degrees
Many owls are nocturnal
Owls can spin their heads a full 360 degrees
Crocodiles have one of the most powerful bites in the animal kingdom
Some crocodiles swallow stones (gastroliths)
Crocodiles produce milk for their young
Snakes use their tongues to help them smell
Snakes dislocate their jaws to eat large prey
Snake jaws can open wide due to flexible ligaments
Honeybees perform a waggle dance to communicate
Honeybees produce honey
All bees can sting multiple times without dying
Ants live in colonies with specialized roles
Some ants can lift many times their body weight
All ants have wings throughout their lives
Parrots can mimic human speech
Ravens can solve complex puzzles
Birds have actual teeth
Sharks have multiple rows of teeth
Whale sharks are the largest fish
Sharks are mammals
Spiders have eight legs
Some spiders can jump impressive distances
All spiders spin webs
Many frogs absorb water through their skin
Toads are a type of frog
All frogs are poisonous
A rhino’s horn is made mostly of keratin
Some rhinos have two horns
Rhino horns are made of bone
Horses can sleep standing up
Foals are baby horses
Horses have six legs
